text: arXiv 2606.19260v1. Equation ∫_ℝ log|F'| dℓ< ∞. Matched concepts: Integral, Real Number, Logarithm, Norm, Variable, Inequality. Integral means an Integral is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result. Real Number means a Real Number is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Logarithm means a Logarithm is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
